title: 14864 Bangladesh Citi. Notification
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i)] Government of India Ministry of Home Affairs New Delhi, the IZ^h October. 2015 Notification S.O - (E). - Whereas, India has acquired certain Bangladeshi Enclaves pursuant to ratification of the agreement between the Government of Republic of India and People's Republic of Bangladesh; And Whereas, fourteen thousand eight hundred sixty four persons who were citizens of Bangladesh living in those enclaves which have now become part of Cooch Behar District of West Bengal in India, have expressed. their intention to acquire Indian Citizenship and have renounced their citizenship of Bangladesh; Now, Therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 of the Citizenship Act, 1955 (57 of 1955), the Central Government hereby specifies that as from the 1st day of August, 2015, the following persons shall be citizens of India, namely:- SI.
